name: Judy's Quick Low-Fat Pasta Primavera
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package instructions.
2. Rinse and drain all canned vegetables; set aside.
3. Steam all fresh veggies, except zucchini, for 6-8 minutes.
4. Add zucchini to steamer during the last 5 minutes.
5. Drain pasta well and transfer temporarily to serving platter.
6. Melt diet margarine in a pan where the pasta was cooked.
7. Blend in garlic powder, oregano, basil, and crushed red pepper.
8. Return pasta and all vegetables (well drained) to the pan.
9. Toss to coat pasta and vegetables with margarine/herb mixture.
10. Heat through while tossing frequently.
11. Serve immediately. Pass grated parmesan cheese for topping.
12. Any leftovers can be reheated in a microwave.
